feedItems.description: allocated £727.4m to Adult Social Care (≈£465 per resident)
allocated £98.7m to Roads & Transport (≈£63 per resident)
allocated £222.2m to Children's Social Care (≈£142 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £57 (3.7%) to £1580
